dc_description: Point-of-view image from inside a small tent, showing a person lying down with their feet extended toward the tent wall. The person is wearing light-colored ankle socks with small dark logos and tan pants. A silver-gray sleeping pad lies beneath their legs, with dark blue tent flooring around it. The tent wall is light-colored fabric with black trim and visible seams, zippers, and wrinkles. A dark bag or pouch is partially visible on the lower left side.
novel_visual_observations: The tent fabric has a bright reflective patch near the upper left-center, suggesting sunlight or a flashlight beam hitting the wall.
The sleeping pad has a textured, repeating patterned surface and occupies the lower center-right of the frame.
location_name: Piazza del Colosseo, Municipio Roma I, Roma
rich_context: Piazza del Colosseo, Celio, Municipio Roma I, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00184, Italia
